# UserLock

## Tags
person, lock, locked, account, secure

## Categories
account, security

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/user-lock)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::UserLock;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        UserLock { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
